clause_text: Notwithstanding any other provision, liability for breach of confidentiality shall be unlimited. This provision shall survive termination.
Any attempted assignment without consent shall be null and void and constitute a material breach.
The Contractor accepts unlimited liability for any damages arising from gross negligence or willful misconduct.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, this agreement grants exclusive licensing rights, and no similar licenses shall be granted to third parties.
Pursuant to Section 5, the distributor is granted exclusive rights to sell the products within the territory, and the manufacturer shall not appoint any other distributors.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, failure to enforce any provision shall not constitute a waiver of the right to enforce it later.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, the rights and obligations under this agreement are personal and may not be delegated or assigned.
The Contractor assigns all rights, title, and interest in any work product to the Company.
The parties agree that New York law shall govern all disputes arising under this Agreement. This provision shall survive termination.
Notice shall be deemed given when delivered personally, or 3 business days after mailing by certified mail. This provision shall survive termination.
Pre-existing IP remains with its original owner; new IP developed jointly shall be co-owned.
Upon expiration, this contract will renew on a month-to-month basis under the same terms and conditions. This provision shall survive termination.
Amendments must be in writing and expressly state that they amend this Agreement. This provision shall survive termination.
Pursuant to Section 5, execution by electronic signature and in counterparts is permitted and binding.
This contract is subject to English law and the exclusive jurisdiction of the English courts.
Waivers must be in writing and signed by the waiving party to be effective. This provision shall survive termination.
Pursuant to Section 5, neither party may assign or transfer this agreement without the prior written consent of the other party, which may be withheld in its sole discretion.
Pursuant to Section 5, this agreement constitutes the entire understanding between the parties and supersedes all prior negotiations.
The parties may sign this document in multiple counterparts, and all together constitute one agreement. This provision shall survive termination.
Either party may terminate this Agreement for any reason upon 30 days' written notice.
This document represents the complete agreement and replaces all previous discussions, whether oral or written.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, the exclusivity provision requires company to source 100% of its requirements from supplier during the term.
The entire agreement clause confirms that no other representations have induced either party to enter this contract. This provision shall survive termination.
This Agreement may be executed in counterparts, each of which shall be deemed an original. This provision shall survive termination.
The Employee agrees not to engage in any competitive business activities within a 50-mile radius for a period of 2 years following termination. This provision shall survive termination.
Pursuant to Section 5, contractor shall not directly or indirectly compete with the company in any manner during the term of this agreement and for 3 years thereafter.
Pursuant to Section 5, the client reserves the right to terminate this engagement at its convenience with 60 days' prior notice.
The Contractor agrees not to recruit or hire any personnel from the Company for 3 years after the end of this engagement.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, employee shall not solicit any customers, clients, or employees of the company for a period of 2 years following termination.
Pursuant to Section 5, all intellectual property created during the engagement shall be the sole property of the client.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, this agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year periods unless terminated by either party with 60 days' notice.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, notwithstanding other termination provisions, company may end this contract without cause upon 90 days' notice.
The indemnifying party's liability under this Agreement shall not be subject to any cap or limitation.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, no waiver of any breach shall be deemed a waiver of any subsequent breach of the same or different kind.
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware. This provision shall survive termination.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, seller shall not directly or indirectly solicit business from any of buyer's customers for 24 months post-closing.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, this agreement may only be amended by a written instrument signed by both parties.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, all notices under this agreement shall be in writing and delivered to the addresses set forth herein.
The Seller covenants that it will not engage in any business that competes with the Buyer's business for 5 years post-closing.
No modification of this contract shall be valid unless executed in writing by authorized representatives.
Electronic notice via email to the designated contact shall be considered valid delivery.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, the initial term shall be followed by automatic renewals unless written notice is provided 90 days before expiration.
